emails.subject: Sun Devil
emails.body: Attached is a summary model for TW's Sun Devil project. The original model is very large; this summary version is smaller but doesn't have the links and supporting pages. Please feel free to call me with any quesions. Kevin Hyatt Director, Business Development 713-853-5559

emails.subject: Re: Sun Devil
emails.body: Re: Sun Devil Thanks. Let's start with this and add more later. We need to bring them along slowly. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Sun Devil
emails.body: RE: Sun Devil kevin: Unfortunately, this is too far in the other direction! The earnings page has no formulas at all. Maybe we should go back to the bigger model if you think it is one that they can work with. Kevin To: Howard, Kevin A.

emails.subject: RE: Sun Devil
emails.body: RE: Sun Devil anytime except Tues morning is available for you. Just let me know when and where. kh To: Gadd, Eric; Hyatt, Kevin
